Projects.

Project 01

Airline Pricing & Route Performance Analysis

Built an end-to-end analytics workflow around airline route, pricing, and operational data to understand route performance, utilization patterns, and pricing behavior.

  • Designed a Databricks and PySpark ETL flow to prepare route and pricing datasets for scalable analysis.
  • Used SQL analytics and regression-based analysis to explore pricing trends, route utilization, and demand patterns.
  • Presented key route performance insights through a Power BI dashboard for easier business interpretation.
DatabricksPySparkSQLPower BIETL
Project 02

Medicare Provider Utilization & Cost Analysis

Analysed CMS Medicare provider utilization and payment data to surface cost drivers, high-cost services, and provider-level spend patterns for healthcare-focused reporting.

  • Worked with Python and SQL to clean, analyse, and structure Medicare claims data for decision-friendly reporting.
  • Explored regression-based cost patterns to better understand utilization and spending behavior.
  • Built KPI-style visual reporting in Power BI to highlight high-impact provider and service segments.
PythonSQLPower BICMS MedicareRegression
